description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, dark gray roof and a minimalist rectangular structure. The exterior walls are light gray, featuring a combination of large horizontal windows and smaller, vertically aligned windows. The front facade includes a recessed entryway and a small overhang supported by a post, providing a subtle porch area. The building is surrounded by a few scattered deciduous trees, enhancing its residential neighborhood context. The overall design is clean and geometric, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and open window spaces. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and metal or wood framing.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light gray walls, and large horizontal windows, featuring a recessed entry and minimal porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a small porch overhang, and three large windows on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view with a single window and a clear view of the flat roof, with trees positioned nearby.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a wide horizontal window and the back portion of the flat roof, with trees flanking the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and the open side of the porch visible, along with surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and rear windows
